text.tspan: u2022 Schema change in 'products' table u2192 break 3 services at once
u2022 No clear ownership; everyone touches everything
u2022 No independent deployment u2014 DB is the coupling
u2022 Reporting query locks contended tables
u2022 Can't scale services independently (one DB capacity)
u2022 'Microservices' in name only u2014 still a distributed monolith
u2022 Each service evolves its schema FREELY (no coordination)
u2022 POLYGLOT PERSISTENCE u2014 right tool per service
u2022 INDEPENDENT SCALING (Cassandra cluster ! Postgres cluster)
u2022 FAILURE ISOLATION (Reporting DB down !! orders broken)
